headline: Super Micro Computer Rises 5%: 3 Reasons Bulls Are Looking Past the Lawsuits
summary: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) shares rose 5% on Tuesday, trading around $22.20 after opening at $21.06. The move comes after a prolonged decline that had left SMCI shares down 28.05% year to date and 38.53% over the past year. The backdrop is anything but clean. Multiple securities class action lawsuits allege Super Micro made false ... Super Micro Computer Rises 5%: 3 Reasons Bulls Are Looking Past the Lawsuits

headline: ‘Uninvestable’ Super Micro sends investors racing to the exits
summary: (Bloomberg) -- On paper, Super Micro Computer Inc. is the type of company that Wall Street can’t get enough of, with soaring sales, an enviable list of partners like Nvidia Corp. and its placement at the center of the artificial intelligence boom.
